//: Scope `.ts` files in this dir as ESM — same reason the Tasks fixture package.json at ../tasks/package.json carries `type:module`: so a future `.mts` launcher can import `./seed.js` / `./store.js` / `./handlers.js` through a real ESM resolver. Vitest uses its own Vite-backed resolver (esbuild + ESM by construction) and is unaffected. Sibling `.spec.ts` files under ../../../ stay CJS because that's where their nearest package.json sits — e2e/ggui-oss/package.json has no `type` field, which is the CJS default.
